---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for PortPane
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Computer-Tsu
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Describe a specific scenario where you
needed something PortPane doesn't currently do.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can — UI sketches,
screenshots from other apps, or step-by-step workflows are all helpful.

---

## Digital Mode Software Affected

Which software would benefit from this feature? (Check all that apply)

- [ ] WSJT-X / JTDX (FT8, FT4, MSK144, etc.)
- [ ] Winlink Express / RMS Express
- [ ] Fldigi
- [ ] JS8Call
- [ ] VARA HF
- [ ] VARA FM
- [ ] Direwolf
- [ ] Hamlib / flrig
- [ ] Other: ___
- [ ] Not specific to any software

---

## Who Benefits

- [ ] Amateur radio operator (digital modes)
- [ ] Emergency communications / EMCOMM operator
- [ ] IoT / Arduino hobbyist
- [ ] IT professional / USB serial console user
- [ ] Other: ___

---

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried other approaches or workarounds? Why don't they fully solve
the problem?

---

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, links, or references that would help explain the request.
